channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Australia is fucked — 43 replies — 164.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Australia is fucked

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-05-16 01:05 UTC

OP

>CGT discount - DENIED
>Negative Gearing - DENIED
Where were you when the Australian dream died?

Early replies (first 3)

62224090
have the liberals said they will reverse it? do we just hold and wait?

62224122
>>62223850
Doesn’t this come into effect in 2027? Should I sell all my crypto before 2027?

62224148
>>62223850
its tiring living here
the new rules favour low return long duration assets. high growth assets like btc and leveraged etfs get smoked compared old rules. run a few tests... under 12 months nothing changes.
i wonder if it actually encourages speculation. might as well punt on options or asx bets miners or U.S letfs... you need BIG wins now

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62224467
>>62223850
SOMEONE EXPLAIN THIS TO ME IN ENGLISH
JUST HOW COOKED ARE WE CUNTS???

62224496
>>62224331
Right thanks m8.

62224499
>>62224440
This, except crypto and boomer rocks.

62224536
>>62224467
Return to pre-1999 CGT system.

62224566
>>62224536
CGT is theft, Fuck you albo.

62224682
>>62223850
I voted for this.

62224702
>>62224536
but... w why they do this do this to us

62224712
I'm of two minds on one hand I have about 600k AUD of cgt obligations which if I were to use the discount while I can would have to lock in maybe 100k of tax this coming year (yes I'll be at 45% bracket because I'm not a brokie)

On the other hand I'm priced out of the property market (not really but I don't want to pay 900k for a shitty Sydney apartment) that any fucking over of property investors is actually a good thing (for me and people my age)

62224719
>>62224712
Doesnt making $600k in profit automatically put you in the highest tax bracket owed regardless of how much you earned from waging?

62226023
Honestly, everyone should be sticking their money into classic cars, right this instant.

Buy a final edition V8 Landcruiser 70 series, a MK V Supra or a Y62 Patrol Warrior and just sit on it.

Watch this space, its exempt from CGT and may sky rocket in value, especially as we push forward into cucked out 4cyl and 3cyl hybrid cuckboxes.

My cars will now become my investments, fuck the Government.

62229029
>>62226023
retro games for me. if you spend less than 500 dollars on a collectible item it's tax-exempt when you sell it. they have more universal appeal than pokemon cards and many well known games are becoming extremely rare to find in complete condition.

62230860
>>62223850
>>62224346
joke of a fucking country
i wanna get out of here where to lads

62233502
>>62226023
yeah you should definitely "invest" in depreciating "assets" because Labor took advantage of their huge political capital
property is STILL the best asset class in Australia by far

62233578
>>62224702
>official inflation is 3%
>inflation is actually 5%
>your asset goes up 5%
>"actually you made a 2% profit goy, pay tax on it"

It's free money for the government in an inflationary environment which constantly understates actual inflation. Basically every asset will have taxable profits while everybody actually gets poorer.

62233595
>>62230860
Fucked if i know cunt. Stealing you pic too.
>>62233502
I'm buying gold n silver.

62233618
>>62223850
Feeling glad that I moved to the US desu

62233642
>>62233595
CGT change still applies + no passive income + risk(ier)
Rent is going to go up and existing properties may get cheaper as capital moves to new builds, which will only be temporary before investors realise no amount of tax incentives will make new builds a good investment
All that being said, I think Labor loses the election after next (which they'll win) and some of these changes will get reversed

62233646
>>62233642
>expecting liberals to do anything useful ever
lol

62233658
>>62233646
If there's one thing they'll do it's change the CGT tax because it's a layup
Also no one is mentioning that Labor blew past their immigration target for the 3rd year in a row, we have at least 6 more years of infinity Indians pumping up rents

62233662
>>62223850
>>62224281
It’s actually worse than that.
No negative gearing for new buyers, but all the existing owners still get their negative gearing grandfathered in lol.

62233868
>>62224712
You'll get the same discount regardless of when you sell. The new system only applies for gains accrued after 1 July 2027. Which also means that for anything that you sell in the future you'll need to know the price on exactly that date, which will be "lots of fun" for illiquid assets like real estate and artwork.

Personally, if LINK seems to be heading upwards by then, I'll pay CGT on the existing amount and move to Singapore for a while.

>>62226023
My last car (Falcon G6E Turbo) beat the stock market. The poor kid who bought it put himself into ridiculous debt for it.

62234274
>>62233642
All i know is i own a house and investing in non pixelated assets for retirement is still a better option than leaving money in the bank.

62234315
>>62223850
I voted for this

62234422
>>62230860
To where? Everywhere is fucked.

t. Bong

62237110
>>62224122
I thought the discount only affected real estate investments? Does it include any investments including crypto?

From what I've heard it isn't happening until 2027. Gives me time to renovate and sell one of my apartments.

62237297
I'm looking to buy an apartment now. Should I max everything and buy a unit near the cbd for 900k or get a tiny studio for like 600k? Surely not all the new builds are bad?

How do I even save money when shares are fucked? Might as well PPOR MAXX right?

>>62237110
>Gives me time to renovate and sell one of my apartments.
You and everyone else mate. Let me know when you are selling so I know when the bottom is in.

62237384
>>62237110
Everything

62237449
>>62230860
Singapore, I moved to singapore. No capital gains tax LOL richer than Aus LOL got PR LOL WHAT WERE THEY THINKING AAH. But you habe to pay cpf! You can take ypur cpf with ya when you leave

62237658
>>62224281
30% min tax on all capital gains.
Which is retarded some bum makes 100 bucks and has to give 30% away lmao. Should just go into income brackets imho
>>62237297
>Might as well PPOR MAXX right?
I keep seeing people say this. How do you make money if you live in your house? You get railed by stamp duty when you sell.

62237662
>>62237658
actual strat is BHP
fully franked dividends are the future

item.title: Saylor bought another 14,500 BTC today — 16 replies — 64.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Saylor bought another 14,500 BTC today

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-05-16 01:10 UTC

OP

STRC just spent 1.2 billion on 14,500 BTC today.

That's about 20,000 BTC bought this week.
It'll be reported in their filings on Monday.

Expect 85k+ price after Monday's announcement.
Saylor cannot be stopped.

Early replies (first 3)

62233588
>>62233472
Not one comment on your post. The fucking 5chan bagholders will miss an obvious 5x opportunity again, but surely the did not miss buying the silver top.
On top of that, did you see what Strive is doing?
https://x.com/Strive/status/2054894518990700568
We ll be getting a 150k BTC soon.

62233663
>>62233588
lol yeah it's typical of 4channel these days no signal all noise.

I like Strive, their chief risk officer made coffeezilla look stupid.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pvZnpppwkoM

62233681
What’s gonna happen to the price when quantum computing breaks all the old wallets?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62233713
>>62233588
>5chan
wut

62233734
you niggers talk like Ai chatbots

62233751
>>62233713
>it's real
https://5chan.app/

62233836
>>62233663
Yup. No alpha here anymore.

62234405
>>62233472
The crabbing around 80k on the charts the last few weeks suggested an "accumulation" phase. Somebody was accumulating at this position without moving the needle.
Now we have confirmation it was Saylor again.
An accumulation sideways phase is often followed by a sudden bull run and then an equally sudden correction. Look for a spike in coming days, and take profit before it dips

62234410
>>62234405
saylor always buy high and sell low

62234415
>>62233681
you are sad.

62234460
>>62234445
Imagine trying to handle gold (analog Bitcoin) what the fuck is wrong with you?

62234663
>>62233734
I was thinking the same thing

62234741
>>62233681
Heard about this a few weeks ago when they supposedly used a research grade QC to crack a very old 15 bit encrypted coin wallet. They said simply it will for crypto into a new realm or it will die. You're a zoomer if you think crypto has been the only currency alternative offered before. Simple.

62237641
>>62234741
Banks and investment companies don't even use yubikey.

Bitcoin is on the cutting edge of security with all the biggest nerds backing it, it'll be fine compared to the rest of the shit out there, lol.

62237679
>>62233472
>a gigantic retard double down on being overleveraged on a dying ponzi scam is bullish news
Lol

item.title: Kraken has moved to CCIP. — 57 replies — 38.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Kraken has moved to CCIP.

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-05-15 23:51 UTC

OP

kek fuddies

Early replies (first 3)

62230910
>>62230891
Time to dump btc from 81 and eth from 2300

62230914
WAGMI WAGMI

62230921
>shovel salesman announces that shovels are useful, actually

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62231802
i think it might actually be LINK's time

62231853
>>62230891
>>62231282

Lido too now lol
Fresh off the presses

62231868
>>62231843
It was foretold. Obvious in hindsight.

62231901
cuckolds are embarassing lmao

price + chart

62231946
>>62231853
ALL AT ONCE

62231990
>>62231853
oooooooof

62231992
>>62231946
OLD NEWS buddy

62232282
>>62230891

This is actually FUD. Cross Chain Interoperability Protocol is a load of gobbly gook (I skimmed thoroughly) and chainlink still hasn't proven its original use case (solving the problem of getting data into smart contracts in a decentralized manner).

The very concept of Sergey's oracle system is unproven, although sensible. All this bullshit being put on top is not "exciting" or "value-added," it is FUD. It is a stream of bullshit without any actual real world uses.

You retards are getting excited by someone scooping shit on top of technological marvels. Imagine the first airplane, thats a blockchain. Now imagine a woman jumping on top the cockpit and taking a huge dump. Thats what your getting excited about.

62232408
>>62231646
Saar I'm sooo white saar!

62232418
Wait I thought LINK was a SCAM?!? You're telling me the most upstanding, honest, and forthcoming company in crypto, King Kraken, has literally entrusted their reputation in the hands of a fat russian big mac enjoyer? So LINK is not a scam? Somebody comfort me please...

62232437
>>62232418
the scoundrel sergey is very convincing

62232441
>>62230891
Thats cool and all but.... one small problem.... uhh... price??? Oh...... and... chart??

62232461
>>62232408
that's adem newfaggot
lurk moar

62232525
>>62232282
This so much, all the top financial institutions of the world are getting absolutely gobblecocked by sergey

Now X R P. THAT is the one correct thing they are choosing!!

62236073
>>62231115
Hello mentally ill faggot how are you doing today?

62236163
>>62231853
This is old news isn't it? Lido was already with CCIP. They're just now publishing their rationale behind the decision.

62236196
>>62236073
doing great thanks
oh btw: pee plus see, bitch

62236449
>>62231646
>i have already won at life

yeah for a guy that's "winning" you don't seem very happy about that

>>62231646
>hope you fixed your porn/masturbation addiction though

you're addicted to keeping track of a random online personality jacking off
dude that's fucking wild

have you told anyone irl?

62236468
>>62236449
Hope you're doing well, Adem

62236472
hey guys --- how's the new "integration" going today? lets check the numbers shall we?


>CCIP fees last 24h: $637

bahahahaha

>Link price action last 24h: -5.2%

bahahahahahahahaah holy shit


nobody, and i mean NOBODY, gets viciously c u c k h o l d e d quite like the boyscouts.... and then comes back time and time again, absolutely BEGGING for more

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62236479
>>62230910
Oh my fuckk you weren't even lying.

I hate this gay ass market.

62236498
>>62231117
You know he probably owns more Link than almost anyone else here, hes just be a dickhole for fun because he knows whats coming.

62236508
>>62230891
i saw kraken now allows margin gambling without having to have a huge portfolio. pretty cool imo. as far as link, i don't think about it at all

62236594
>>62236163
Well here's a completely new one.

62236605
OMFG WE ARE MOONING!!!!!

62236616
HOLY FUCKING SHIT IT JUST KEEPS GOING!!!!!

62236626
>faggot ass stinkies gloating over nothing
This thread is now the $9 dollar waiting room

62236630
can't wait until the failure of stink is so obvious, even the delulu marines cannot deny it any longer

they will be forced to admit that poverty is their only bedfellow

62237484
>>62236630
the thing is this grift can go on for about 8 more years, the next bull will take link up to 17 and then 4 years until it bottoms to 2.50-5 dollars, then next bull will take link to maybe 8-9 dollars. so its going to be about 12 years until the marines realize they fucked up.


by then people like chainlink god will just point out hurdles that chainlik has had.

chainlink reserves will be dumped and i pray to god that another competitor comes and takes away some of the defi market share chainlink has got.

item.title: remember when LINK cucks spent the entirety of 2022 — 13 replies — 26.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
remember when LINK cucks spent the entirety of 2022

Open thread • Replies: 13 • Updated: 2026-05-16 00:52 UTC

OP

blaming Bulgarians and NEXO for their shitty price performance while calling anyone who made fun of their bags Bulgarians

Early replies (first 3)

62236293
>>62236269
kek fuddie there was literal proof

62236306
>>62236293
are Bulgarians the reason you're still a poor baggie in 2026? lol

62236412
>>62236269
LOL

i remember repeatedly being called bulgarian back then

then when that wore off there was the guy who always posted the na pidgeon language or whatever implying i was african or something. never really understood that one

and on and on it goes... the cult always has a mythological bad guy who seemingly has so much power he can suppress their billion dollar asset indefinitely

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62236572
>>62236412
hahahahahaha I remember that too. There was a schizo Linkie calling people Nigerians. The cherry on top of the cake is that Chainlink panders to niggers and even pays them to participate in crypto conferences

62236597
It's always one more integration until moon.
One more partnership until moon.
One more law passed until moon.
The latest carrot on a stick is the last one. For real this time.
This year is the year. All the breadcrumbs are fulfilled. Or something. Any pattern recognition is just "fud."

62236602
>>62236293
No one needs to fud LINK, sweatie.

62236652
>>62236269
Why even make fun of it anymore? This project has gone nowhere for almost 5 years maybe longer, at this point you're giving this dead project more attention than it deserves

62237093
>>62236652
OP and everyone ITT holds LINK

62237126
>>62237093
Baggie cannot envision anyone not holding LINK (also can't rotate an apple in his head or tell you how he would feel if he'd skipped breakfast this morning)

62237134
i remember being called a bulgarian and it was crazy funny because im actually a bulgarian living in bulgaria

62237144
>>62236269
Cripple

62237499
>>62236269
He unironically won. He shorted link from the top while dumping deposited tokens at nexo and made millions.

62237634
>>62236269
Hey hey hey, I am Bulgarian.

item.title: Bitcoin "wastes energy." XRP has declared war on real cryptocurrency! — 16 replies — 22.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin "wastes energy." XRP has declared war on real cryptocurrency!

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-05-16 00:39 UTC

OP

When did this happen?? I thought Ripple banking partners were just full of shit, liars, and purposely deceitful!

They are now saying real consensus mechanisms are "wasting energy!" XRP has 130 validators, VETTED BY THEM, WITH BULLSHIT CONSENSUS SOFTWARE.

Early replies (first 3)

62231653
> we have incentive to do this thing
> totally btc is bad because of le bad energy use!!

62231656
>>62231647

KABOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62231682
I pray something awful happens to this company

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62231978
>>62231647
but are they wrong doe??

62232008
>>62231978

Yes

62232419
>>62231647
>They are now saying real consensus mechanisms are "wasting energy!" XRP has 130 validators, VETTED BY THEM, WITH BULLSHIT CONSENSUS SOFTWARE

6% up btw
Touch grass fudcuck

62232757
>>62231647
This isn't a bad thing.
Bitcoin is more useful than the whole country of Argentina.
Maybe we should cut power to Argentina since they don't produce much of a value.

62232870
>>62231647
Kaboom

62233780
>>62231647
KABOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62236240
>>62231647
KABOOOOOM

62236298
>>62232757
this

62237114
>>62231647
BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62237117
>>62232419
And down again BOOOM

62237547
>>62232757
>>62236298
Argentina is the world's fifth largest beef producer, btc depending in who you ask, is either a shittier version of xmr, or le digital gold (i.e. fucking useless).

62237554
>>62237547
>xmr

just admit you are all in on xmr

62237597
>>62237554
I own exactly 0 (zero) crypto currency.

item.title: BTC prediction — 5 replies — 20.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC prediction

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-05-16 01:11 UTC

OP

It's near $79k now. Which does it hit first, $59k or $99k???

Early replies (first 3)

62237496
>>62237477
doesnt matter
NVDA going to infinity

62237519
$59k, followed by $40k in October

62237521
*hits pipe*

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62237629
>>62237477
Either now or after faking out 81-82 over the weekend and dumping on Sunday.

62237684
>>62237477
if it breaks above 82k then the next dip will be to 70k before going to 99k. if the dip happens from here then 59k before 99k.

item.title: >They rescinded my j*b offer and are now requesting the PC monitors they sent back. — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>They rescinded my j*b offer and are now requesting the PC monitors they sent back.

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-05-16 01:18 UTC

OP

>They rescinded my j*b offer and are now requesting the PC monitors they sent back.
What a way to head into the weekend.

Early replies (first 3)

62237561
>>62237557
Shouldn't have sent them all that hentai as an email response to their acceptance letter.

62237617
>>62237561
if they don't like touhou buttholes I don't want to work there

62237689
>>62237557
Sorry anon. I would just keep the PC monitors though

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62237705
Thanks for playing bro

item.title: holy FUCK — 10 replies — 9.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
holy FUCK

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-05-16 00:19 UTC

OP

/biz/ was finally right about something??
/smg/ won. it really did. wow...

Early replies (first 3)

62235318
>>62234821
/biz/ is weird in that sometimes it has the stupidest fucking takes imaginable and then other times it has been 100% spot on with all of its calls with no misses. I got quite a good TQQQ tip the other day that I rode.

I think enabling country flags would go a long way to solving this issue.

62235334
>>62234821

I love /smg/

62235454
>>62234821
Thanx for crashing it anon. You must be new here.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62235795
>>62235318
They should implement country flags on /robinhood/ so I can find out which companies are ran by indians and not invest in them.

62235853
>>62234821
But doesn't daily geared etfs fuck you over hard if you hold them for more than a day?

62236008
>>62235853
no, that's a lie to keep plebians poor

62236789
>>62235853
I've got long term capital gains when I finally cash out my soxl

62236845
>>62235853
>>62236008
It's partially true. A 3% downward swing is more impactful than a 3% upward swing, so you need the upward trajectory to beat the market by quite a bit to justify holding leveraged ETFs long-term. For example, QQQ (regular NASDAQ) is up 117% over the past 5 years, but QQQ3 (3x leveraged NASDAQ) is "only" up 236%, not ~350, and at its worst it was down 50% at one point, far more than the base NASDAQ

62236885
>>62235853
Yeah, I held a 3x gold for awhile and made like 40% on it while gold doubled. Held it for like half a year though

62237543
>>62234821
David always wins

item.title: You should be holding at least 1 BTC. — 90 replies — 48.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
You should be holding at least 1 BTC.

Open thread • Replies: 90 • Updated: 2026-05-15 23:29 UTC

OP

Imagine not owning at least 1 BTC before institutions and governments vacuum the remaining supply while you’re still debating if Bitcoin is a scam… or just trading crypto without considering BTC long term.

Early replies (first 3)

62219945
>>62219942
Or I can trade alts (leveraged BTC) and actually make it instead of getting a 2x pump

62219995
Fuck. I have 2BTC . Is that enough bro?

62220027
>>62219995
no, i have 3. and it's not enough, we're just poor faggots

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62230004
I'm all in StrategyInc tho

62230021
>>62219942
What's supposed to be happening in the op pic

62231066
>>62225044
I got jewed of my own dip, gf was home all day yesterday and i didn't buy.
I hate women so much is unbelievable

62231072
>>62229557
Why though anon? It’s not like this is some random vaporware project. They already have partnerships with names like GoMining, Ledger, a16zcrypto and others around the ecosystem.

62231081
>>62230004
Why all in? : (

62231090
>>62229433
Good advice so far.

62232211
>>62222594
There's solution for this

62233500
>>62231072
is that legit?

62233508
>>62231066
You hate woman because you like man. Gayish bitcoiner

62233709
>>62233500
Yeah anon. There’s already almost 51k BTC staked in the protocol too, which is like $4B+ worth of BTC already participating around the ecosystem.

62233716
>>62223021
You can always keep slowly adding over time anon. Most people don’t even have close to 1 BTC.

62233736
>>62224655
it will be your opportunity as well.

62233806
>>62229570
I'm from Spain and I live well. Got small biz + doing crypto + forex + stocks. Life is good.

62233821
>>62233709
never though there's protocol exists like this

62233827
>buy btc
buy link
buy ICP
buy avax

62233835
>>62228833
And Ethereum is the godess

62233840
>>62228631
Hes just a homosexual and fears for the virginity of his anus

62233880
>>62233827

worst trash available
>UNGMI

62233986
>>62233821
Yeah anon, it already exists but I think a lot of people just still aren’t paying attention to the newer BTCFi infra yet. And it’s still pretty early too since the TBVs haven’t even launched yet, which should unlock even more native BTC use cases.

62233993
>>62225388
See this anon?

62233997
>>62224679
The funniest part is you probably think debasing fiat printed out of thin air is somehow more “real” than a globally traded asset with trillions in liquidity.

62234000
>>62230021
Gonna be dead broke without BTC lol.

62234021
>>62233806
Aren't you fucked with taxes and DAC8 now, I cannot buy anymore via a cex here

62234099
>>62233840
It sucks being gay

62234109
>>62234021
do the alternative. Privacy

62234248
>>62234021
Government is shit.

62234899
>>62233986
I don’t think that’s enough when ETH literally lives and dies by DeFi activity.

62235825
>>62222594
you don't need to

62237090
>>62220146
give me money

62237423
>>62219995
you're rich mate.

item.title: I'm 33 and still working an entry level job as a BDR in tech/SaaS. — 20 replies — 34.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
I'm 33 and still working an entry level job as a BDR in tech/SaaS.

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-05-16 00:46 UTC

OP

I'm 33 and still working an entry level job as a BDR in tech/SaaS. What the fuck do i do now? I don't even like what I do

Early replies (first 3)

62236318
>enter thread
>download op image
>leave thread

62236322
>>62236309
Sex!

62236326
>>62236309
I deserve to have sex with women who look like this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62236330
>>62236309
At least you’re not a 30 year old entry level analyst dealing with retarded ass sales reps all day long. I bet you get paid better too.

62236409
>>62236309
That is a job for someone literally a decade younger than you. Why not just get an AE job?

62236420
>>62236409
I might have at this point. My current employer is Gate keeping me from getting an AE promotion. I've applied so many times for remote AE positions , but they won't hire you unless you have previous AE experience. I might have to start applying to on site roles now which will suck, but at least if they accept me then I'll have some experience

62236517
>>62236309
I'm 33 and work in Walmart as a stocker

62236592
>>62236420
It's cuz you're (literally) competing against 500-1000+ applicants per role, even including the on-site roles. And no, baseddit strategies like
> just go to the last page on linkedin bro, less applicants to compete against that way bro
> you can't give up bro! it's a numbers game bro!
will not work because everyone else out there is already using the same strategy, hence the flood of applicants per job which make it impossible to even get an interview. And for that linkedin point, used to work but not anymore because every job posted on there has the stupid "promoted" tag which exposes it to the entire globe of applicants within seconds. Each job posting gets bot applicant flooded within micro seconds. Many of these applicants also have rockstar-tier resumes too so good luck competing against them.

tldr; job market is PERMANENTLY fucked, thank AI and globalism for this mess

62236645
>>62236309
>33
>entry level
nigga you lost a whole decade of your life you need to figure out what happened there

62236684
>>62236318
kek

62236700
>>62236517
How long have you been working there? Was it easy to get the job?

62236733
>>62236517
Become a stonker.

62237056
>>62236309
just get promoted to AE like the rest of the sales monkeys. its not any harder. literally apply yourself to applying for better roles the way you prospect for opportunities in your day job u sped

62237118
>>62236318
literally me

62237179
>>62237118
It's some kind of long format ai clip I found but didn't save in time
Shit is hot af

62237198
>>62237179
there you go

62237427
>>62237198
This AI shit is to gooners what crack cocaine was to black neighbourhoods in the 80s. We are not far off from everyone just being able to generate their 10/10 goon material at the press of a button and edge 24/7. It's Joever (at least for your prostates)

62237463
>>62237198
>>62237427
Coomer here. Maybe I'm just old, but AI shit kills my boner the moment I see it. I can't get over the uncanny valley feeling.

62237611
>>62237198
Do you have that one where a goth egirl poses with a boomer, then the scene switches to them both covered in sweat like they both had rough sex?

62237614
>>62237427
24/7 gooning sounds bullish for cloud providers and electricity generation.

62237326
>>62234810

>>62235289

62237340
>>62237326

Previous post of mine, I was wondering why I sold.
These fucks still haven't delivered V2 when the whole back to L1 debacle started.

Also the fact that I started my own business and now see clearly how unserious they are about scaling up.

62237361
>>62237340
No one cares about your life you dumb weirdo, but they are delivering v2 despite how slow they’ve been, it’s currently being audited. The mega whale who sold is pretty stupid. Nigga couldn’t wait until the end of summer jesus

62237370
>>62237361
kek, this board helped me become wealthy I try to give back

62237374
>>62237370

62237379
>>62237361

>~50k
>megawhale
bruh I dropped that as a meme in venice, which pumped multiples.

>>62237374
yeah I'm giga salty about kleros because they wasted massive potential

62237392
>>62237379
nvm 350K, thought it was much more down in the shitter
anyway enjoy the hold

62237418
>>62237392

62237446

62237529

item.title: The BIGGEST Crypto Integration in History — 81 replies — 12.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
The BIGGEST Crypto Integration in History

Open thread • Replies: 81 • Updated: 2026-05-15 18:55 UTC

OP

Historic moment as Chainlink services have been selected to be used by the DTCC! This is monumental to the crypto and blockchain industry. They even pinned the tweet! Wow, to think how far we have come as an industry.

Early replies (first 3)

62224616
Is this good or bad?

62224627
when are people going to wake up and realize that chainlink is the only crypto that matters? when will the fucking price finally go up?

62224642
>>62224627
I think you honestly really needed the spoon feeding from autists here back in 2017 to gather the confidence we have in Link. By the time Link got on the crypto map in 2020 or whenever people were cemented in their cliques for whatever coin they believed in. Most of the crypto space are normalfaggots. I’ve gotten a handful of people to buy, but you can never tell them to go all in cuz they are not emotionally invested in link. I got6 people to invest 300, 300, 700, and 500 and 400 and 1700. Almost all of them

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62227473
>>62224616
bad, sell the news event + token not needed
>>62224627
chainlink might matter, LINK does not

>>62224974
many ICO bros made it back in 2020 at $50 withtheir 50-70k stacks, sure they're no warrent buffets but it was enough to live comfortably, too bad most didn't sell

>>62225125
yeah, as long as the tokens aren't needed you can have top of the NASDAQ sucking Chainlinks dick, people just stopped caring, it's not 2017 anymore. Back then it would've sent LINk to triple digits, but those days are long gone, peoeple wanna see actual demand nowadays, but it ain't coming, because Chainlink /= LINK

62227498
>>62224863
Sui has always been 1k

62227508
>>62227498
jesus dude that's like $10k, even if LINK does a 3x (and that's being generous) you'd only have $30k, what are you gonna do with that? lol

62227538
SERGEY BETRAYS US

SELL SELL FOR YOUR LIVES

62227556
>>62224958
This anon is correct.

62227563
>>62227508
Link will be 1k+

62227593
>>62227563
No it will pump to $30 and dump back down to $5.

62229154
>>62224577
it's big news!

62229156
>>62229154

62229158
>>62229156

62229164
>>62229158
Is that fat bitch* still fudding?

*the woman not Sergey

62229165
>>62229164
She's Nadine Chakar from the DTCC and she's partners with Chainlink

62232247
Bump. They trying to slide the other thread so hard lol.

62232345
>>62227563
lmao
lmao
lmao
lmao

62232462
>>62232345
Swift, DTCC, Fidelity plus the other 600 more.

62232545
>>62224577
how tf did we get to $50 on nothing but with literally everything we are barely afloat at $10?

62232606
>>62232545
because when it hit $50 everything else in crypto was pumping for no reason at all, leading to a terrible crash, and the market has basically been dead for 6 years, with only bitcoin seeing consistent gains and solana's shitcoin casino being lamer and scammier than eth's. When accounting for inflation, this entire market has been on life support since 2021.

62232658
I'm so excited for you crazy kids

62232694
>DTCC settles $2.5 quadrillion per year
>Chainlink gets used for 1% of that
>1% of the settled value as collateral
>Full dilution
>1 LINK = $250

62232746
>>62232545
Did you miss Ari-Sama’s thread earlier this year? It’s being shorted

62232794
>>62232545
the fat fuck scammer has released like 400 million coins onto the market since then, diluting your bags. You got scammed.

62232796
>>62226079
I’m 45 next week

62232803
>>62232694
You factor swift and every single other company ever and plus front running and suddenly the meme $81,000 number doesn’t seem very meme.

62232805
>>62227397
Chainlink gatekeeps itself. I’ve told countless normies about a link in 8 years and about 6 people have bought in. And all but 1 have less than 1,000 and the other has 2,000. I also told some kid when playing poker and he got like half his frat to buy in. The people who I have told who didn’t buy wouldn’t buy anyway.

And anyone who does buy isn’t gonna buy anything more than a sui stack at most because you have to be emotionally invested in any investment in order to buy a lot. I have a very affable personality and energy and even tho I’m totally dumb on anything technical…. People believe me. Oh I also got a chick to buy 3,000 link during covid who has a husband.

62234063
>>62232794
Which is less than most.
Bitcoin for instance released half its supply by 2013-2014, which is also when it pumped the most.

In fact, all cryptos in general pumped the hardest when they inflated the hardest.

62234092
Chainlink is literally a cuckold club full of incels waiting for their "real life to begin". They've been bagholding for 9 years while Sergey (their God) dumped on them.

THE cuckolds of crypto

62234112
>>62224577
No greater fools left i see.

62236050
>>62232694
>MOAC
please give me what ever copium you are taking

62236496
duuuuuude don't question the cult
duuuuuuude this investment is for geniuses only
duuuuuuude partnerships


>Despite its internal culture of obfuscation, Enron projected an illusion of transparency, largely through a sophisticated public relations strategy. The company's charismatic leaders, Ken Lay and Jeff Skilling, were often seen on financial networks and at industry conferences, extolling Enron's virtues and its role as a market innovator.

>The company's annual reports and press releases were masterclasses in euphemism and grandiosity. Technical jargon and ambiguous language created an aura of complexity that dissuaded scrutiny. Questions were deflected with a common refrain: Enron was too innovative to be understood by the uninitiated.

62236514
>>62232694
>duuuuuude if we just capture 1%

you need to watch this https://www.youtube.com/shorts/7Z4-WRmZ8j8

item.title: >never had a gf >never been on a date >now 36 >had jobs >go to gym >finally lose weight and have a BMI less than 25 >mak… — 64 replies — 10.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>never had a gf >never been on a date >now 36 >had jobs >go to gym >finally lose weight and have a BMI less than 25 >mak…

Open thread • Replies: 64 • Updated: 2026-05-15 18:57 UTC

OP

>never had a gf
>never been on a date
>now 36
>had jobs
>go to gym
>finally lose weight and have a BMI less than 25
>make multiple dating profiles on different apps
>zero matches

So I'm a confirmed subhuman. And, judging by the responses to ugly males who post their pics on Reddit and ask why they get no matches, normies openly laugh at me and think I deserve a low status life of slavery.

Why should I give a fuck about putting in effort at work or saving the west or whatever? Any sort of participation is a scam for someone like me.

Early replies (first 3)

62223666
>>62223664
>>>/adv/

62223769
>>62223664
depends how tall u are and if u have any real ugliness causing things like deformity or burn scars etc.

U probably are just average looking and if u arent 5'4'' u will find a gf

62224072
>>62223664
are you swiping on fat women or only the stacies?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62233004
>>62231869
no shit dumbass. if youve had meaningless sex with 50 women you've fried your brain romantically

62233012
kill fat people

62233014
bro online dating is HORRIBLE. Unless you're like the top 5% of hot guys out there it's gonna be a depressing humiliation ritual. You prob have to hire a professional photographer and make it look like you have a vibrant, exciting life with a bunch of staged pics. I used shitty selfies a decade ago, but now it doesnt cut it.

62233017
>>62233014
this. If not a chad you need to be fully optimized with pics and lifestyle. Otherwise irl, which probably means 1 girl opportunity every few months otherwise you spoil the well

62233024
>>62232652
This
It’s sickening once you look into it.
Women at large are getting blamed when half the women on there are fake profiles anyway. There’s plenty of fake men’s profiles now too, dedicated to romance scams. Which is a whole other issue, men and women being victims

62233040
>>62233017
>that ugly guy with super polished tryhard profile

this unironically gives girls the ick

62233064
>>62233040
they get the ick from the guy being ugly. Selecting photos where he looks most attractive is only going to help compared to bathroom selfies. If he does that he'll get 0 matches guaranteed.

62233065
>>62233040
If hes ugly they already have the ick

62233066
>>62233065
exactly. The most important tip is don't be ugly. 2nd is don't be autistic as fuck. 3rd actually talk to girls whether online or irl whatever.

62233115
>>62223664
Dating apps arent for dating they're for sluts to get their holes blown out by a small selection of chads and fuckbois.

62233200
>>62233115
>chads
>fuckbois
what's the difference?

62233241
>>62233200
Chads don't have to try because their appearance does everything. Fuckbois have to try hard to get women to fuck them. They still have fuck but the level of effort is completely different.

62233271
>>62223664
I posted my face on soc once when I was drunk.

Everyone gave me an 7 or 8/10. I still feel ugly though.

62233283
>>62231723
5/10 roasties only swipe on 8+

62233302
>>62233283
/thread

All women swipe 3+ points up. If you're only attracting morbidly obese women, down syndrome women and old fat single mothers, you're an above average looking guy.

These studies have already been done 1,000 times. Average looking guys get 1 match a month abs it's usually a fake/bot account or a 300+ pound clown with 20 fishhooks in its face.

62233310
>>62223664
your ugly ancestors got pussy somehow and so can you

62233355
>>62223664
Remember, for every beautiful person, there must be 5 ugly ones.

I don't make the rules.

62233408
>>62223664
Why do you want a girlfriend? If you want to LOVE a woman you are gay, sorry to tell you. You need to start niggermaxxing, learn to pump and dump

62233456
>>62223664
Go to Philippines, Moldova, or Gambia, depending on what race you prefer. You'll get more girlfriends than you know what to do with.

I'd post some pix of hot bare-titties Himba girls but the jannies get all assblasted about that for some reason.

62233560
>>62232980
>Where in person did you meet your wife?
GF of a friend introduced me to her.
This strategy requires having friends, I know that's too much to ask of GenZ nowadays.

62233715
>>62233271
i never posted on soc but i did on the site photofeeler where people rate your pic. Out of 120 rates i averaged to a 3/10

which makes sense since im khv at 30. I am way too scared to post my face on this site though thats crazy

62233733
you can't be this naive at 36, its surprising how many manchildren there are in the west still chasing dating and love and marriage when your zoomer generation have figured it out for the scam that it is

62233792
>>62233733
yep, one of the most popular streamers smashes his face with a hammer... lmfao

all of this was figured out over a decade ago but no one wanted to listen.

62234041
>>62232735
>social pariah wonders why he's not surrounded by a harem of qt3.14s
many such cases

62234043
>>62233715
I'm 32 and a virgin. Just dick in pussy/ass virgin. I've done everything else. Also 6'3" and slender/fit.

62234052
Maybe you shouldn't spend so much time around permavirgins (reddit)

62234972
>>62233241
oh, I guess I'm a fuckboi. I've optimized everything possible and fuck a lot. I also live in a small town and have chicks drive 70 miles to my place on the regular for a first meetup. Got one tonight and another next Thurs for a "sleepover"

>>62233283
They do but eventually they run out of those dudes or they don't followup with meeting up. Sub8s wont see the chicks who just signed up for the apps but they'll likely see her after a few months. She'll humble herself after these dudes just pump and dump them over and over and they start going for the charming less attractive guy who ultimately just fucks and dumps then anyway, then they go for true beta bucks after that.

>>62233310
there werent many options back then and girls needed a guy for survival. Now every girl has the world at her fingertips and their own money.

>>62233456
yea this is the only option for a sub5 guy or mgtow

>>62233560
Yea your way is the best. I had a few of those situation but I never liked the girl enough or she had to move for college etc unfortunately. It really comes down to luck.

>>62233733
>chasing dating and love
this was exciting when I was a teenager. As an adult it's only fun to pump and dump. I do think love can exist if you find a good woman to build a family with though.

62235106
>>62223664
Bro stop using apps. Also those things you listed are no substitute for being able to competently speak to and entertain women. It is, unfortunately, a learned skill. You have to practice. A good way to learn is to flirt with women a little older than you. They typically like the attention from a younger man and are more forgiving of missteps.

62235448
Being ugly doesn't matter. Being 36 doesn't matter. Focus on confidence, charisma and making women feel heard and seen. Don't put so much weight on it, be a fun person to be around. Play around and test things out. You do really make your own reality. Don't convince yourself of these negative things.

62236519
>>62223664
>1pbtid demoralization
>>/glownigger/

item.title: Day 1 of snailposting every day until ICP is at $1000 — 30 replies — 9.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1 of snailposting every day until ICP is at $1000

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-05-15 22:19 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62231434
>>62231412
Where the fuck is moonman? That's all I want to know, and what's his 2026 take on ICP. I've been all-in on ICP since the day moonman blessed us with his alpha, so fuckin, just tell me. If there's anyway of getting into his email list, how do we do it?

62231445
>>62231434
I don’t know who this moon man is, I just know that ICP has superior tech and is the only blockchain in the crypto space that actually rivals amazon web services. Good things take time and patience.

62231464
>>62231445
How can you be an ICP baggie and now know the legendary moonman, and his influence over /biz/ in the glorious '21 bullrun. Dude. You're clueless, hit the archives, the only reason I hold ICP is because moonman said all the right shit back in the day.
> ICP has superior tech
> only blockchain in the crypto space that actually rivals amazon web services

These and many other classic ICP talking points are all derived from the threads moonman made 5 years ago. The entire narrative was weaved by moonman, and all the shit you read today is nothing more than an echo of what we've been promised back in '21
If you're gonna be an icy piss baggie, learn the history newfag, you don't know the half of it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62231483
>>62231412
You didn't even make it to day 10 last time

62231521
>>62231464
>These and many other classic ICP talking points
They are not talking points, I am an analyst. ICP has the technology, they are far more advanced than they were in 2021. in 2021 ICP didn’t have chain fusion, it didn’t have partnerships, it didn’t have a cloud engine, it didn’t have caffeine.

You are a fucking moron. Kill yourself.

62231611
>>62231521
I'm an ICP maxxxi you dumb hick son of a bitch, I'm more of an icypee enjoyer than you. Fuck you, you don't even know about the most important part of ICP (moonman) and you wanna talk shit to me. lil nigga I'm one of the big bois, shut your ass up and listen to your betters. Go into the archives and inform your stupid ass

62231879
>>62231611
I DONT FUCKING KNOW WHO THAT IS, I DON’T CARE ABOUT SOME FUCKING INFLUENCER, FUCK YOU AND FUCK MOONMAN

62231905
>>62231879
how could you not know moonman? are you some kind of retard? look him up on tiktok dumbass dont u know how to do DD?

62231987
>>62231879
He's not an influencer you fucking retard, moonman was a /biz/ tripfag legend. What the fuck are you doing on 4chan? What the fuck are you doing on my website if you don't understand anything about anything that happens here. You're a dirty ESL thirdie son of a whore if you're here without having any knowledge of these things. Eat shit, sell your bags, get some LINK or XRP, those are a little more up your speed you subhuman Indiian mongrel

62232035
>>62231987
I speak 4 languages and I am whiter than you.

I don’t like jeets. I don’t like niggers and I don’t like your attitude.

62232109
>>62231434
When moonman shilled this, the price was $60, now it's $2.8, saying you were here since moonman means you are down 99% LMAO

62232146
>>62232109
It doesn't mean he was wrong just early. This will be $10k when the market realize the potential of this with datacenters. The it won't matte lr if ur entry was $100 or $1. Literally any time is the best time to buy this. It's a lock and a steal at current price. You'll be a millionaire if u buy now

62232188
>>62232146
Nah it's over, they had 5 years to produce something and aside from dumping tokens dfinity had nothing to show for it, tech is not everything, VHS beat the laserdisk even though the laserdisk was superior

62232641
/pol/ brainlets btfo, ok? Moonman scam finally getting reveal

62232893
>>62232035
>I speak 4 languages and I am whiter than you
Tell me you're an ESL mongrel without telling me you're an ESL mongrel.

>>62232109
What is DCA?

62233413
>>62232893
It's always funny when American retards use "ESL" as an insult
>lmao he speaks multiple languages, what a loser!
when they themselves can only (barely) speak one and a niggerified version at that.

TAO will win btw.

62233482
Why are retarded boards like this even allowed? A good number of the boards are just idiots snail posting. Look here, faggot, no one gives a shit about your pet alt coin.

Get a real job and invest something that actually provides value to society.

62233690
>>62232893
>Tell me you're an ESL mongrel without telling me you're an ESL mongrel.
To be fair, English is my third language. I am Swiss.
And you're some hick from the US who barely speaks English.

62233710
>>62231412
ICP is going all the way

... to 3 cents

62234355
Please fuck my ass

62234451
>>62232146
bro you're more deluded than the silver+gold shills in PMC.

Stop coping, you got scammed, by a white man who was smarter than you and said the right things to manipulate you. He's rich, and he's long gone from here, and he left you with his bags.

Cope, sell, and get into basic stocks instead.

62234701
>>62233690
> I am Swiss
Nah dude, you're a fag

>>62233413
Nigger cope

>>62234355
This guy gets it

>>62234451
10k is retarded, moonman said it would hit 2k, so that's what's gonna happen

62234717
>>62232035
Newfag, moonman tricked a bunch of retards into buying ICP by pretending to be a racist to earn the trust of some poltards.

62234733
>>62231412
day 1? that's quite a snail you've got there
$1000? you need a head start..

62234782
>>62234701
okay retard, i told you, you're too stupid and foolish to listen, you will 100% die poor and miserable.

I'll be leaving this thread, its a waste of my time.

62234801
someone has to start the snail. thank you fellow icypee chad

62234924
>>62234717
>moonman tricked a bunch of retards into buying ICP by pretending to be a racist
Where does the "pretended" angle come from? Did he ever say that in his mail list thing? I see fags saying this shit all the time, but never ever has a single fucking screenshot or or anything really been surfaced to back this gay claim up. Where the fuck are guys getting this from, post it.
>>62234782
If you don't like ICP why did you even open this thread, let alone post in it in the first place. Begone jew.

62235637
>>62234924
>Where does the "pretended" angle come from?
Maybe it’s the fact that his handle was moonman 14/88 and on his hand written notes he had swastikas. Just a shot in the dark here…

62236543
>>62232893
>What is DCA?
fuck off

62237256
ICP 2k EOY OK?

item.title: Bitcoin or altcoins? — 101 replies — 8.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Bitcoin or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 101 • Updated: 2026-05-15 13:31 UTC

OP

If you had to pick, what would you buy right now: BTC or altcoins? I’m not seeing much ROI in alts lately, even utility or memecoins.

Early replies (first 3)

62195293
>>62195275
Bitcoin until 120k

62195300
you can't time the market I thought like >>62195293
last time, bitcoin to 70k and sell half and go into alts and then 2021 alts just fucking died for a year.

The alts that pumped are things that haven't gone parabolic yet, or big projects like Solana with glowie money attached to them. Ones like Link are not going to 1000 regardless of cope.

/biz/ will pretty much only give you bad info too. I've found maybe 3 coins here that were Guaranteed returns, everything else I had to research myself. In fact I remember last year posting proof that CRCL stock was going to 10x on IPO and got XRP schizos fudding me out of taking a life changing position.

I actually hate the fuck out of baggies.

62195373
>>62195293
Why 120k only?? Why not 1M?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62211429
>>62211194
hbar going down to 2c before it ever gets a chance at real traction

62211440
>>62195275
>Chainlink is the future

62211870
>>62211440
Hahaha

62211903
>>62195275
Everyone moved to BTC of course, I dumped my ETH for BTC too, I used to hold BTC because of staking but now I can stake BTC natively thanks to TBV and the likes

62211915
>>62195275
I’d rather keep stacking BTC, then put it to work via native staking / yield layers (like Babylon-style setups) instead of chasing dead charts and hoping for a narrative pump.

62211928
>>62209385
Ok as you say so

62211932
>>62211429
Hbar is okay to hold and buy

62212034
>>62195275
More potential upside on alts for the next six months. Specifically memes right now.

62213245
>>62211440
What's your price target anon?

62214696
>>62211932
All in or?

62216973
>>62211915
It's worth considering anon

62216987
>>62195275

Polkadot

62220595
>>62209854
Are you sure?

62224657
>>62216987
Why polkadot?

62224666
cny/usd is > .147 now w/trump headed to china. every penny that can chase risk on is gonna get horned up immediately. The ONLY thing the US has left is the dollar as a w3@p0n. Plus, i can't afford any more makers mark bottles unless my alts start pumping w/haste, so...

62224894
>>62224666
Crazy

62224972
>>62224666
We're cooked

62226444
>>62224666
Risk-on driven by geopolitics, liquidity, and alcoholism. Peak crypto posting.

62228393
>>62216987
>ICP

62228841
chainlink

62229090
>>62216987
he's also pedo

62232214
>>62228393
And why

62232231
>>62195275
>buying the top of the bull trap
Never change, /biz/

62232233
>>62195275
Alts
If I'm already going for a risky meme-asset like crypto I might as well go for broke. Bitcoin already had its big run, now it's just stock market levels of gains with far greater risk.

62232268
>>62232231
Also, this threads riddled with bots holy shit

62232289
>>62195275
Altcoins for profit, Bitcoin for stable investments.

62233740
>>62228841
I'm not holding this

62234251
>>62232289
